name: Bird Jumper
author: Poki
description: Bird Jumper is a platform puzzle game where you need to guide a hungry bird to eat all the worms! Navigate through dangerous obstacles and strategically plan your route to avoid deadly traps. Get magic potions to gain special abilities like double jump or flight. Earn coins along the way to unlock a variety of cool bird skins. With its blend of puzzle-solving and action-packed gameplay, Bird Jumper will put your skills to the ultimate test. Can you help the jumping bird satisfy its hunger and complete all levels? How to play Bird Jumper? Move: A, D, or left and right arrow keys Jump: W, the space bar or up arrow key Down: S or down arrow key Who created Bird Jumper? Bird Jumper is created by elSai. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Bird Jumper for free? You can play Bird Jumper for free on Poki. Can I play Bird Jumper on mobile devices and desktop? Bird Jumper can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
